calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove Up Hearing For Plaintiffs' Judgment By The Court As Defendant Douglas Insulation Company, Inc.
Off Calendar May-01-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Geoff T. Sloniker, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs, DALE L DRINN, DONNA ANN O'BALLE, and FORA OLSON.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) DOUGLASS INSULATION COMPANY, INC.,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that Judgment be entered for Plaintiff DALE L. DRINNIN and agaist Defendant DOUGLASS INSULATION COMPANY, INC. for interest in the amount of $30.14;
IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED tht Judgment be entered for Plaintiff DONNA ANN O'BALLE and against Defendant DOUGLASS INSULATION COMPANY, INC., for interest in the amount of $258.51;
IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED tht Judgment be entered for Plaintiff FLORA OLSON and against Defendant DOUGLASS INSULATION COMPANY, INC., for interest in the amount of $7,627.21;
$7,627.21.
FURTHER, IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that Plaintiffs are awarded costs in the amount of $560.00;
The total amount of the Judgment is $8,475.85.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2014 Continued To Jun-11-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
